name: inv_allows_empty_arch
reason: An architecture with zero layers should not satisfy the invariant, as it represents no address translation at all

name: inv_allows_non_page_aligned_entry_size
reason: An entry_size of 3 bytes is nonsensical for page tables; inv should enforce entry sizes are multiples of PAGE_SIZE

name: upper_vaddr_exceeds_max_base
reason: upper_vaddr with any nonzero base at layer 0 exceeds MAX_BASE, suggesting the spec lacks a base-range guard

name: inv_allows_single_entry_layer
reason: A layer with num_entries=1 is degenerate and provides no fan-out; inv should enforce num_entries > 1

name: entry_size_is_next_layer_vacuously_true
reason: For a single-layer arch the implication is vacuously true, allowing arbitrary entry_size values that bypass the hierarchical size constraint
